transcript.text: Good morning, मैं Yogesh DHL Express India से बोल रहा हूँ। क्या मैं Mr Anthony Gressive से बात कर रहा हूँ?
Language coach: Reply in Hindi for the next turn.
नमस्ते Mrs Anna Gressive, धन्यवाद आपने कॉल लिया। मैं आपके DHL क्रेडिट अकाउंट के लंबित भुगतान के बारे में बात कर रहा हूँ। क्या अभी कुछ समय है कि हम इस विषय पर चर्चा कर सकें?
Yeah, I have some time, 5 minutes.
Language coach: The customer is speaking in English. Reply entirely in English on your very next turn. Use zero Hindi, Hinglish, Bengali, or mixed-language filler.
Thank you, Mrs Anna. I am calling regarding your overdue DHL credit account. The total outstanding is INR 57,920 across 3 invoices. May I know the reason the payment has not been made yet?
Oh, I didn't receive those invoices yet.

Thank you for letting me know, Mrs Anna. You can download all your invoices directly from the DHL MyBill portal at mybill.dhl.com using your registered email, Anthony@mybiz.com. If you have any trouble accessing the portal, I can resend the invoice copies to your registered email. Would you like me to do that?
हां सोचती हूं आप भेज दो आप email से भेज दो।
Language coach: Reply in Hindi for the next turn.
धन्यवाद, Mrs Anna Gressive। मैं आपके रजिस्टर्ड ईमेल Anthony@mybiz.com पर तीनों लंबित इनवॉइस की कॉपी अभी भेज रहा हूँ। कृपया अपना इनबॉक्स चेक करें। अगर कोई और सहायता चाहिए तो बताइए।
नहीं अभी ठीक है अभी के लिए मैं देखती हूं।
धन्यवाद, Mrs Anna Gressive। कृपया इनवॉइस चेक करने के बाद भुगतान शीघ्र करें। यदि कोई और सहायता चाहिए तो मुझे बताइए। आपका दिन शुभ हो।

result.message: Mock resend triggered. The invoice will be sent to the registered email address.

agent_commitments: Agent triggered an invoice resend to the registered email address.
summary.agent_tone_assessment: Agent remained polite and procedural, and the next steps were kept tied to DHL collections policy.
follow_ups: Customer should review the resent invoice and arrange payment.
summary.headline: Invoice resend was triggered and payment follow-up remains open
summary.next_action: Customer should review the resent invoice and arrange payment.
